anchor.snippet: A gauge theory is a type of theory in physics
is called a gauge transformation
is a property called gauge invariance
gauge invariance is sometimes called gauge symmetry
any theory that has the property of gauge invariance is considered a gauge theory
the electric field E and the magnetic field B are observable
is also a solution to Maxwell's equations and no experiment can distinguish between these two solutions

annotations.label: Gauge symmetry and energy conservation imply charge conservation

anchor.snippet: if gauge symmetry holds, and energy is conserved, then charge must be conserved
the gauge transformations for classical (i.e., non-quantum mechanical) general relativity are arbitrary coordinate transformations

annotations.label: General covariance is a special case of gauge invariance

annotations.label: Gauge symmetry needed for renormalizable QED
